title: rosa canina var. stipularis
intro: Rosa canina var. stipularis, also known as the Dwarf or Alpine Dog Rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa canina species, a deciduous shrub native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. stipularis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
